login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please enter your details to sign in

register.title: Sign Up
register.subtitle: Join REMOV and start sharing your movie thoughts
register.success: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.success: Reset link has been sent to your email address

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Please enter a new password for your account

checkEmail.title: Check Your Email
checkEmail.sentText: We have sent a verification link to your email address
checkEmail.noEmailHint: Didn't receive the email? Check your Spam/Junk folder or click the button below to resend

verifyEmail.title: Verifying Email
verifyEmail.verifying: Checking the validity of your verification code...
verifyEmail.success: Email verified successfully! Your account is now ready
verifyEmail.error: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Please try again
